title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand's principal legislation establishing the office of Ombudsman, defining investigative functions over public service agencies and state enterprises, complaint procedures, and powers of inquiry. This Act governs independent oversight of government administration and complaint resolution mechanisms.
